artifacts.sourceOfTruth: reviewed repository inventory of protected evidence artifacts
artifacts.regenerate: Edit deliberately with a golden update record; never generate from the changed tree alone

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: Rust contract types emitted through forge-validate schema and TypeScript codegen
artifacts.regenerate: pnpm codegen:contract

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: D68 environment, configuration, secret-reference, ownership, promotion, and authority semantics
artifacts.regenerate: Edit deliberately with a compatibility review, focused policy/runtime tests, and a golden update record; never infer it from a deployed environment

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: D69 immutable application-image, runtime-identity, writable-path, probe, TLS, network, resource, termination, and evidence-nonclaim semantics
artifacts.regenerate: Edit deliberately with compatibility, security, Compose, image-smoke, and rollback review; never infer a production claim from a successful local or CI container run

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: D70 protected-source, digest-only GHCR publication, attached attestation, independent pull, runtime verification, and managed/live nonclaim semantics
artifacts.regenerate: Edit deliberately with compatibility, workflow, registry, security, license, and external-evidence review; never infer managed deployment authority from image publication

artifacts.owner: platform, gateway, operations, and security maintainers
artifacts.sourceOfTruth: D71 trusted correlation, structured-event allowlist, redaction exclusion, cardinality, and maturity-nonclaim semantics
artifacts.regenerate: Edit deliberately with compatibility, privacy, security, runtime, and operations review plus a golden update record; never derive safe fields from captured payloads

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: registered Fastify/TypeBox routes, compatibility matrix, and contracts/documentation.json metadata
artifacts.regenerate: pnpm docs:contracts

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: forge-golden reports over the four canonical ModelSpec contracts
artifacts.regenerate: cargo run -q -p forge-wasm --bin forge-golden -- examples/vx2-mini.forge.json examples/qd-mini.forge.json examples/hrx7.forge.json examples/vx2-hornet.forge.json > crates/forge-wasm/tests/fixtures/golden.jsonl

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: read-only extraction from the immutable prototype HTML
artifacts.regenerate: node scripts/extract-counts.mjs prototype/cad-object-studio.html --out prototype/extracted-counts.json

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: read-only deterministic execution of the immutable prototype drivers
artifacts.regenerate: node scripts/extract-trajectories.mjs

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: deterministic translation from the immutable prototype
artifacts.regenerate: node scripts/translate-monolith.mjs

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: reviewed stable validator verdicts and error check IDs for every first-party contract
artifacts.regenerate: Review forge-validate reports and edit expectations only after classifying the invariant change

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: forge-sim exporters over examples/vx2-mini.forge.json
artifacts.regenerate: cargo test -p forge-sim --test write_fixtures -- --ignored

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: reviewed engine-backed MuJoCo measurements with fixture identity and threshold metadata
artifacts.regenerate: FORGE_MUJOCO_PARITY_CMD='python -m forge_workers.mujoco_parity' pnpm sim:parity -- --capture-baseline crates/forge-sim/tests/fixtures/mujoco-parity-baseline.json

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: deterministic parity-gallery captures and structural edge metrics
artifacts.regenerate: pnpm -r build && pnpm parity -- --out artifacts/parity; copy only reviewed composites and metrics into docs/assets/parity

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: reviewed Brief-25 coverage vocabulary and acceptance corpus
artifacts.regenerate: Edit only with a corpus-version and coverage rationale; there is no auto-accept command

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: minimized reviewed ModelSpec failures with pinned verdict and diagnostic IDs
artifacts.regenerate: node scripts/fuzz-contract-seeds.mjs --help; add only a minimized case preserving the target diagnostic

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: reviewed minimized trust-boundary failures with pinned acceptance or refusal outcomes
artifacts.regenerate: Edit deliberately with stable case IDs and a golden update record; minimize failures without weakening the governed boundary

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: the pinned Rust/WASM toolchain and forge-wasm facade source
artifacts.regenerate: pnpm build:wasm

artifacts.sourceOfTruth: the canonical first-party contracts under examples/
artifacts.regenerate: pnpm demo:sync
